title: US Politicians Optimize Digital Presence to Influence AI Chatbots
summary: US political campaigns are now optimizing candidates&\#x27; online content to shape how AI chatbots like ChatGPT respond to voter queries, a practice known as answer engine optimization \(AEO\). This trend creates a new avenue for manipulating electoral information, as chatbots can rapidly incorporate optimized content and may produce inaccurate or biased responses, undermining information integrity. The New York Times reports that Wikipedia updates are crawled by chatbots within about 12 minutes, and a Scottish election experiment found over one-third of AI answers contained errors.
context: Answer engine optimization \(AEO\), also known as generative engine optimization \(GEO\), is the practice of structuring digital content to improve visibility in AI-generated responses. As voters increasingly use AI chatbots to research candidates, campaigns are adapting their online strategies to influence these systems.
